---
title: Path Resolution Test
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        # The CSS link should point to the adjusted path
        # From chapters/intro/, the path to shared/styles.css
        # is ../../shared/styles.css
        - ['link[href="../../shared/styles.css"]']
---

## Test Document

This document tests that `!path` values in `_metadata.yml` files
are adjusted relative to the document location.

The CSS file is located at `project/shared/styles.css`.
The `_metadata.yml` in `chapters/` specifies `css: !path ../shared/styles.css`.
When this document (in `chapters/intro/`) is rendered, the path should be
adjusted to `../../shared/styles.css`.
